# stb libraries

Single-header public domain libraries by Sean Barrett.

- **[stb_image](stb_image.h)** v2.30 -- image loading
- **[stb_image_write](stb_image_write.h)** v1.16 -- image writing

Source: https://github.com/nothings/stb
